name: anvil
description: Anvil. Multi-tenant industrial sales-ops platform. Vercel serverless functions over Supabase Postgres, with a Vite + React + TypeScript browser app under src/v3-app.

scripts.build: rm -rf public/assets public/index.html public/v3-app && vite build
scripts.check: for f in $(find api src/api -name '*.js' | sort); do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && node --check src/client/anvil-client.js && npm run typecheck && npm run check:imports
scripts.audit: node src/scripts/audit-migration.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-screens-deep.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-cross-screen.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-ux.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-backend-calls.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-hardcoded-data.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-data-model.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-cross-module.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-dead-handlers.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-write-paths.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-rbac.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-rls-coverage.mjs && node src/scripts/audit-pdfjs-worker.mjs
scripts.predeploy: npm run build && npm run check && npm run verify && npm run audit:systemic
